site.title: Dr. Sean Tobin
site.tagline: Leaving the Egypt of distraction and fear.
site.intro: I'm a clinical psychologist and Catholic convert writing at the intersection of faith, psychology, and the age of AI. The Inner Exodus is the journey out.
site.irenaeus: The glory of God is man fully alive, and the life of man is the vision of God.

bio: Sean Tobin is a clinical psychologist, a convert from atheism, and a charismatic Catholic. His work sits where the interior life meets the clinic: healing, worship, and teaching people how to stay human in an age built to scatter them.

He writes The Inner Exodus, a Substack read by tens of thousands at the intersection of faith, psychology, and artificial intelligence. He writes about attention, desire, formation, and what machines can and cannot do to the soul.
He is the author of Big God, Little Devil and Remaining Human, leads worship, and speaks widely on psychology, deliverance, and the spiritual life.

pillars.name: Healing
pillars.text: Clinical psychology in the light of grace: therapy, discernment, and the slow repair of the interior life.

pillars.name: Worship
pillars.text: Leading people into the presence of God through music, the posture the whole work flows from.

pillars.name: Teaching
pillars.text: Essays, books, and talks on faith, psychology, and the age of AI. Formation for people who refuse to be automated.

books.title: Remaining Human
books.subtitle: A plain-language companion to Pope Leo XIV's encyclical on AI
books.description: A readable guide to Magnifica Humanitas: what artificial intelligence is doing to attention, desire, and the soul, and how the Church calls us to remain fully human as the machines arrive.

books.title: Big God, Little Devil
books.subtitle: A radical shift in the approach to spiritual warfare and deliverance
books.description: A psychologist's book on the demonic that refuses both obsession and denial: the devil is real, and he is small. A book about getting the proportions right, and getting free.

books.title: Sick Seven
books.subtitle: A children's story about anxiety and presence
books.description: A picture book for kids about the worry that visits us all, and the quiet, steady presence that meets it. Gentle, funny, and true.

books.title: The Heart of Exorcism
books.subtitle: Faith, healing, and evangelization
books.description: The follow-up to Big God, Little Devil: what deliverance is really for. Not spectacle, but the healing and evangelization at the heart of the Church's ministry.

books.title: Humanity in the Age of AI
books.subtitle: Staying human when the machines arrive
books.description: A wide-angle look at what artificial intelligence is doing to human life: work, attention, relationship, and meaning, and how to stay fully human through the shift.

books.title: Big God, Little Devil Companion Workbook
books.subtitle: A guided workbook for the journey out of fear
books.description: The working companion to Big God, Little Devil: exercises, examinations, and prayer structures for actually walking free rather than just reading about it. Releasing later this month.

podcast.episode: What Exorcists on YouTube Get Wrong
podcast.blurb: Episode 177. Mental health, the demonic, and where popular deliverance content goes off the rails.

podcast.episode: Inside Rome's Exorcist Conference: Are Demons Using AI?
podcast.blurb: From the Vatican's exorcism course: the demonic, discernment, and the strange new questions AI raises.
Where clinical psychology ends and spiritual warfare begins, and why confusing the two harms people.
A return conversation on how deliverance and the mind actually fit together.
A wide conversation on Big God, Little Devil: fear, the demonic, and the God who is bigger than both.
Deliverance, inner healing, and the psychology beneath both.

music.title: Overshadow Me (Ruach)
music.blurb: A prayer set to music, asking the Spirit to overshadow. The ruach of God.

music.title: You Alone
music.blurb: A song of surrender. You alone are enough.

music.title: Source and Summit (Acoustic)
music.blurb: A song for the Eucharist, the source and summit of the Christian life.

music.title: Lord and Giver of Life
music.blurb: A charismatic worship single invoking the Holy Spirit, Lord and Giver of Life.
